content: remark-lint is a unified/remark plugin ecosystem with ~70 rules (each in its own npm package), 3 presets. Rules check syntax consistency, formatting, structural issues. Supports frontmatter validation via remark-lint-frontmatter-schema (JSON Schema draft-2019-09). Two separate modes: lint and fix (not all rules auto-fixable). Output works with remark CLI and ESLint reporter adapters. AST-based processing means deep Markdown analysis. Plugin-composable via unified pipeline.
